description: Nginx性能稳定性分析 - 响应时间分布、稳定性指标等

targets.rawSql:
SELECT (quantile(0.95)(total_request_duration) - quantile(0.50)(total_request_duration)) / quantile(0.50)(total_request_duration) * 100 as stability_coefficient FROM nginx_analytics.dwd_nginx_enriched_v3 WHERE $__timeFilter(log_time)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_unit IN (${business_unit:singlequote}), $business_unit)
    AND $__conditionalAll(environment IN (${environment:singlequote}), $environment)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_domain IN (${business_domain:singlequote}), $business_domain)
    AND $__conditionalAll(platform_type IN (${platform_type:singlequote}), $platform_type)

SELECT stddevSamp(total_request_duration) as response_time_stddev FROM nginx_analytics.dwd_nginx_enriched_v3 WHERE $__timeFilter(log_time)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_unit IN (${business_unit:singlequote}), $business_unit)
    AND $__conditionalAll(environment IN (${environment:singlequote}), $environment)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_domain IN (${business_domain:singlequote}), $business_domain)
    AND $__conditionalAll(platform_type IN (${platform_type:singlequote}), $platform_type)

SELECT countIf(total_request_duration <= 5) * 100.0 / count() as availability_5s FROM nginx_analytics.dwd_nginx_enriched_v3 WHERE $__timeFilter(log_time)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_unit IN (${business_unit:singlequote}), $business_unit)
    AND $__conditionalAll(environment IN (${environment:singlequote}), $environment)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_domain IN (${business_domain:singlequote}), $business_domain)
    AND $__conditionalAll(platform_type IN (${platform_type:singlequote}), $platform_type)

SELECT countIf(response_status_code < '400') * 100.0 / count() as success_rate FROM nginx_analytics.dwd_nginx_enriched_v3 WHERE $__timeFilter(log_time)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_unit IN (${business_unit:singlequote}), $business_unit)
    AND $__conditionalAll(environment IN (${environment:singlequote}), $environment)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_domain IN (${business_domain:singlequote}), $business_domain)
    AND $__conditionalAll(platform_type IN (${platform_type:singlequote}), $platform_type)

SELECT '极快(<100ms)' as `响应时间段`, countIf(total_request_duration < 0.1) as `请求数`, countIf(total_request_duration < 0.1) * 100.0 / count() as `占比(%)` FROM nginx_analytics.dwd_nginx_enriched_v3 WHERE $__timeFilter(log_time)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_unit IN (${business_unit:singlequote}), $business_unit)
    AND $__conditionalAll(environment IN (${environment:singlequote}), $environment)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_domain IN (${business_domain:singlequote}), $business_domain)
    AND $__conditionalAll(platform_type IN (${platform_type:singlequote}), $platform_type) UNION ALL SELECT '快速(100-500ms)' as `响应时间段`, countIf(total_request_duration >= 0.1 AND total_request_duration < 0.5) as `请求数`, countIf(total_request_duration >= 0.1 AND total_request_duration < 0.5) * 100.0 / count() as `占比(%)` FROM nginx_analytics.dwd_nginx_enriched_v3 WHERE $__timeFilter(log_time)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_unit IN (${business_unit:singlequote}), $business_unit)
    AND $__conditionalAll(environment IN (${environment:singlequote}), $environment)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_domain IN (${business_domain:singlequote}), $business_domain)
    AND $__conditionalAll(platform_type IN (${platform_type:singlequote}), $platform_type) UNION ALL SELECT '正常(500ms-1s)' as `响应时间段`, countIf(total_request_duration >= 0.5 AND total_request_duration < 1) as `请求数`, countIf(total_request_duration >= 0.5 AND total_request_duration < 1) * 100.0 / count() as `占比(%)` FROM nginx_analytics.dwd_nginx_enriched_v3 WHERE $__timeFilter(log_time)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_unit IN (${business_unit:singlequote}), $business_unit)
    AND $__conditionalAll(environment IN (${environment:singlequote}), $environment)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_domain IN (${business_domain:singlequote}), $business_domain)
    AND $__conditionalAll(platform_type IN (${platform_type:singlequote}), $platform_type) UNION ALL SELECT '慢速(1-3s)' as `响应时间段`, countIf(total_request_duration >= 1 AND total_request_duration < 3) as `请求数`, countIf(total_request_duration >= 1 AND total_request_duration < 3) * 100.0 / count() as `占比(%)` FROM nginx_analytics.dwd_nginx_enriched_v3 WHERE $__timeFilter(log_time)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_unit IN (${business_unit:singlequote}), $business_unit)
    AND $__conditionalAll(environment IN (${environment:singlequote}), $environment)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_domain IN (${business_domain:singlequote}), $business_domain)
    AND $__conditionalAll(platform_type IN (${platform_type:singlequote}), $platform_type) UNION ALL SELECT '极慢(>3s)' as `响应时间段`, countIf(total_request_duration >= 3) as `请求数`, countIf(total_request_duration >= 3) * 100.0 / count() as `占比(%)` FROM nginx_analytics.dwd_nginx_enriched_v3 WHERE $__timeFilter(log_time)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_unit IN (${business_unit:singlequote}), $business_unit)
    AND $__conditionalAll(environment IN (${environment:singlequote}), $environment)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_domain IN (${business_domain:singlequote}), $business_domain)
    AND $__conditionalAll(platform_type IN (${platform_type:singlequote}), $platform_type) ORDER BY `请求数` DESC

SELECT 'P50' as `分位数`, quantile(0.50)(total_request_duration) as `响应时间(ms)` FROM nginx_analytics.dwd_nginx_enriched_v3 WHERE $__timeFilter(log_time)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_unit IN (${business_unit:singlequote}), $business_unit)
    AND $__conditionalAll(environment IN (${environment:singlequote}), $environment)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_domain IN (${business_domain:singlequote}), $business_domain)
    AND $__conditionalAll(platform_type IN (${platform_type:singlequote}), $platform_type) UNION ALL SELECT 'P75' as `分位数`, quantile(0.75)(total_request_duration) as `响应时间(ms)` FROM nginx_analytics.dwd_nginx_enriched_v3 WHERE $__timeFilter(log_time)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_unit IN (${business_unit:singlequote}), $business_unit)
    AND $__conditionalAll(environment IN (${environment:singlequote}), $environment)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_domain IN (${business_domain:singlequote}), $business_domain)
    AND $__conditionalAll(platform_type IN (${platform_type:singlequote}), $platform_type) UNION ALL SELECT 'P90' as `分位数`, quantile(0.90)(total_request_duration) as `响应时间(ms)` FROM nginx_analytics.dwd_nginx_enriched_v3 WHERE $__timeFilter(log_time)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_unit IN (${business_unit:singlequote}), $business_unit)
    AND $__conditionalAll(environment IN (${environment:singlequote}), $environment)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_domain IN (${business_domain:singlequote}), $business_domain)
    AND $__conditionalAll(platform_type IN (${platform_type:singlequote}), $platform_type) UNION ALL SELECT 'P95' as `分位数`, quantile(0.95)(total_request_duration) as `响应时间(ms)` FROM nginx_analytics.dwd_nginx_enriched_v3 WHERE $__timeFilter(log_time)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_unit IN (${business_unit:singlequote}), $business_unit)
    AND $__conditionalAll(environment IN (${environment:singlequote}), $environment)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_domain IN (${business_domain:singlequote}), $business_domain)
    AND $__conditionalAll(platform_type IN (${platform_type:singlequote}), $platform_type) UNION ALL SELECT 'P99' as `分位数`, quantile(0.99)(total_request_duration) as `响应时间(ms)` FROM nginx_analytics.dwd_nginx_enriched_v3 WHERE $__timeFilter(log_time)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_unit IN (${business_unit:singlequote}), $business_unit)
    AND $__conditionalAll(environment IN (${environment:singlequote}), $environment)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_domain IN (${business_domain:singlequote}), $business_domain)
    AND $__conditionalAll(platform_type IN (${platform_type:singlequote}), $platform_type) ORDER BY `响应时间(ms)` ASC

SELECT $__timeInterval(log_time) as time, avg(total_request_duration) as avg_response_time, quantile(0.50)(total_request_duration) as p50_response_time, quantile(0.95)(total_request_duration) as p95_response_time, quantile(0.99)(total_request_duration) as p99_response_time FROM nginx_analytics.dwd_nginx_enriched_v3 WHERE $__timeFilter(log_time)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_unit IN (${business_unit:singlequote}), $business_unit)
    AND $__conditionalAll(environment IN (${environment:singlequote}), $environment)
    AND $__conditionalAll(business_domain IN (${business_domain:singlequote}), $business_domain)
    AND $__conditionalAll(platform_type IN (${platform_type:singlequote}), $platform_type) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: 📊 响应时间稳定性趋势 - 平均/P50/P95/P99

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT business_unit FROM nginx_analytics.dwd_nginx_enriched_v3 WHERE business_unit IS NOT NULL AND business_unit != ''
list.label: 业务系统
list.name: business_unit
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT business_unit FROM nginx_analytics.dwd_nginx_enriched_v3 WHERE business_unit IS NOT NULL AND business_unit != ''

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT environment FROM nginx_analytics.dwd_nginx_enriched_v3 WHERE environment IS NOT NULL AND environment != '' AND $__conditionalAll(business_unit IN (${business_unit:singlequote}), $business_unit)
list.label: 环境
list.name: environment
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT environment FROM nginx_analytics.dwd_nginx_enriched_v3 WHERE environment IS NOT NULL AND environment != '' AND $__conditionalAll(business_unit IN (${business_unit:singlequote}), $business_unit)

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT business_domain FROM nginx_analytics.dwd_nginx_enriched_v3 WHERE business_domain IS NOT NULL AND business_domain != 'unknown'
list.label: 业务域
list.name: business_domain
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT business_domain FROM nginx_analytics.dwd_nginx_enriched_v3 WHERE business_domain IS NOT NULL AND business_domain != 'unknown'

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT platform_type FROM nginx_analytics.dwd_nginx_enriched_v3 WHERE platform_type IS NOT NULL AND platform_type != 'unknown'
list.label: 平台类型
list.name: platform_type
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT platform_type FROM nginx_analytics.dwd_nginx_enriched_v3 WHERE platform_type IS NOT NULL AND platform_type != 'unknown'

title: 性能稳定性分析
